academy_notebook.name: Academy Notebook
academy_notebook.description: A worn leather-bound notebook filled with scribbled lectures.

travel_ration.name: Travel Ration
travel_ration.description: Dried meat and hardtack. Keeps you going.

chalk_piece.name: Chalk Piece
chalk_piece.description: White chalk used for temporary markings.

healing_herb.name: Healing Herb
healing_herb.description: A small bundle of dried herbs with a faint medicinal scent.

old_coin.name: Old Coin
old_coin.description: A tarnished coin from a forgotten era. Worth a few copper to a collector.

lost_notebook.name: Scholar's Lost Notebook
lost_notebook.description: A leather-bound notebook lost in the fields.

slime_remains.name: Slime Remains
slime_remains.description: A gelatinous blob left behind by a defeated slime. Still faintly warm.

goblin_ear.name: Goblin Ear
goblin_ear.description: A sharp, pointed green ear, cut from a defeated goblin.

kobold_remains.name: Kobold Remains
kobold_remains.description: Evidence of a defeated Kobold, requested by the Old Wizard.
